scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend,electron-build,electron --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run build:watch --workspace electron" "npx wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:1420 && npm run start --workspace electron"
scripts.dev:browser: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && npx playwright test --ui"
scripts.dev:backend: cd src/core/backend && PORT=3000 NODE_ENV=development bun --watch main.ts
scripts.build: npm run bun:compile && npm run build:frontend && npm run build --workspace electron && npm run dist --workspace electron
scripts.gen:check: npm run gen && git diff --quiet -- src/core/frontend/src/generated/modules.ts src/core/frontend/src/generated/sdk || (echo 'Codegen not committed. Run npm run gen and commit generated files.' && git --no-pager diff -- src/core/frontend/src/generated/modules.ts src/core/frontend/src/generated/sdk && exit 1)
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "console.log('Module SQL migrations are applied automatically on backend startup. No standalone db:migrate script configured yet.')"
